items.title: Pinterest Reduces Spark OOM Failures by 96% Through Auto Memory Retries
items.summaryShort: Pinterest Reduces Spark OOM Failures by 96% Through Auto Memory Retries. Pinterest Engineering cut Apache Spark out-of-memory failures by 96% using improved observability, configuration tuning, and automatic memory retries.

items.title: Presentation: Duolingo's Kubernetes Leap
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Duolingo's Kubernetes Leap. Franka Passing discusses the architectural shift of Duolingo’s 500+ backend services to Kubernetes.

items.title: Article: A Better Alternative to Reducing CI Regression Test Suite Sizes
items.summaryShort: Article: A Better Alternative to Reducing CI Regression Test Suite Sizes. How can you focus in a sea of results from a large regression test suite?

items.title: Podcast: Context Engineering with Adi Polak
items.summaryShort: Podcast: Context Engineering with Adi Polak. In this episode, Thomas Betts and Adi Polak talk about the need for context engineering when interacting with LLMs and designing agentic systems.

items.title: Dynamic Languages Faster and Cheaper in 13-Language Claude Code Benchmark
items.summaryShort: Dynamic Languages Faster and Cheaper in 13-Language Claude Code Benchmark. A 600-run benchmark by Ruby committer Yusuke Endoh tested Claude Code across 13 languages, implementing a simplified Git.

items.title: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund
items.summaryShort: OpenAI alums have been quietly investing from a new, potentially $100M fund. Zero Shot, a new venture capital fund with deep ties to OpenAI, is aiming to raise $100 million for its first fund.

items.title: Gas prices aren't the only factor fueling used EV sales
items.summaryShort: Gas prices aren't the only factor fueling used EV sales. The most recent electric vehicle sales data provided a grim picture — at least for new EVs.

items.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
items.summaryShort: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline. Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.
